{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201211130DE25B9F84F55FFC607F"}"},"total":3836},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7271859672818336570","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者快更新就更新这么点，怎么够看嘛？而且这里边把西方写的也太强了吧！我感觉东方一个大罗金仙都能碾压他们的…"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1693111883,"group_id":"7258583820620794942","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个对写作有些兴趣的无知少年","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N043Uz+hyhUisGTYKnVHgrP5xoHPITOGDSih9TWfoJQ8","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7cb5110ab47e4b96a7bd94fcd7aec1d1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529451&x-signature=ms0ayq3%2BKND7X6NoCzs8x2djAlc%3D","user_id":"4301762925707107","user_name":"风过归途"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4301762925707107","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7258583820620794942","book_info":{"abstract":"神话擂台降临，各国本土神明接踵而至。
小樱花有天照，天竺有湿婆，鹰酱有奥丁…
唯独华夏神系缺失，华夏战败。
然而命运的齿轮开始倒退，苏铭重生了，手握华夏完整神谱。
可曾听闻千古一帝嬴政，以人类之躯斩杀西方神王……
美猴王应召而来，众生皆呼，只认傲来齐天圣，不识西天斗战佛！
诗仙李白，剑气纵横三万里，一剑光寒十四洲，那一剑竟真的开了天门……

288382460696","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，挺燃的，看几天了，我看介绍那些也没写有女主啊，应该没吧，都几百章了 战斗！战斗爽！其次，有女主差评，如果我想看的是言情又或是男主后宫打架之类爽文，有比这更专业的，真没兴趣看他们谈恋爱，这本小说目前为止没出现。李白嬴政太帅了！","text_exts":[{"e":74,"s":71,"text":"战斗爽","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%88%98%E6%96%97%E7%88%BD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317739798735FFC607F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227336498288382460696%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227258583820620794942%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%88%98%E6%96%97%E7%88%BD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1708162775,"group_id":"7258583820620794942","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"世界在下沉，我们在狂欢","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxrdkxDbRalzBtj0yu0HwHyEUufzbTRadoNpHWk1Tu4Y","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6d863ffdfbc44a5aa684d2d3a9424a07~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776534771&x-signature=TSEireUBHwCGWgb2ORfweAPnsS0%3D","user_id":"4059007492041950","user_name":"长生s"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4059007492041950","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1735035554,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","tit
